empty.hint: Type in the omnibar and press Enter.

host.label: Ollama Host
host.description: URL where the Ollama server is running

model.label: Default Model
model.description: Model name to use for chat (e.g. llama3, mistral)

thinkingColor.label: Thinking Indicator
thinkingColor.description: Border effect shown while Ollama is generating a response

systemPrompt.label: System Instructions
systemPrompt.description: System prompt instructions to guide the model's behavior

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Output randomness control (lower is more focused and deterministic)
